milestones.name: Founding Note Due
milestones.description: A runner from your creditor leaves a reminder at the guild hall. The amount is small, but it proves Monsterhall has to pay its way.

milestones.name: Collector At The Gate
milestones.description: A collector arrives in person and wants proof that your new guild can turn tower support into coin. Excuses will cost you.

milestones.name: Interest Crush
milestones.description: The debt is now large enough that starter jobs are not enough. You need a broader roster, better rooms, and patrons who pay for specifics.

milestones.name: Ledgers Bared
milestones.description: Your creditor demands written proof that the tower can carry a real operation. The payment is higher, but so is the time to prepare for it.

milestones.name: Tribute Cart
milestones.description: A wagon crew arrives to haul away what you owe. If the guild cannot meet the tribute, the crew will help themselves to supplies and morale.

milestones.name: Broker Compact
milestones.description: The debt has become formal enough to attract brokers, signatures, and humiliating witnesses. The amount is steep, but the tower is finally being treated like a guild.

milestones.name: Founder's Due
milestones.description: This final payment marks the point where Monsterhall stops being a desperate outpost and starts becoming a serious institution.
